flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Grove City College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.0k → $12.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Grove City College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.3k → $21.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Grove City College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (86.8% → 77.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Grove City College fell 75% between 1997 and 2000 ($10.5k → $2.6k).
